creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 148982
Patch to upgrade net/turnserver to 3.2.4.6

Upstream announced a new release:

[RFC5766-TURN-SERVER 1386] Build rfc5766-turn-server-3.2.4.6 is avilable

This is a maintenance build:

- Relay RTCP sockets ports allocation fixed.
- SSL renegotiation callback fixed.
- List of libraries cleaned.
- Debian UFW file added to the Debian package.
